Zahid Tractor Celebrates 75 Years of Partnership with Caterpillar – A Historic Milestone for a Better Tomorrow.

Zahid Tractor Construction Machinery Division (CMD) recently marked a significant milestone, celebrating its 75th anniversary as the official Caterpillar dealer in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. In celebration of this milestone, Zahid Tractor hosted a gala dinner at its...
